title: Existence, Uniqueness and Classification of Plane Waves
summary: Existence, uniqueness and classification is established for plane waves supported by an irreversible reaction which is a smooth function of local reactant and product concentrations (or prey and predator populations). Rudimentary analytic techniques are used to guarantee a unique plane wave at every wavespeed $V>V_*$ above some threshold. The result readily extends to cutoff reactions, which are zero below some threshold product concentration. These results are not novel, but the method of proof is.

AI.tldr: 使用初等分析方法建立了不可逆反应平面波的存在性、唯一性和分类理论
AI.motivation: 研究不可逆反应（或捕食者-被捕食者系统）中平面波的存在性、唯一性和分类问题，这类问题在反应扩散方程和生态学中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 使用初等分析方法（rudimentary analytic techniques），通过构造性方法证明平面波的存在性和唯一性
AI.main_theorems: 对于所有大于某个阈值V*的波速V>V*，存在唯一的平面波；结果可推广到截断反应（在产物浓度低于阈值时为零的情况）
AI.significance: 虽然结果本身不是新的，但证明方法是新颖的，为这类经典问题提供了更简洁或更直观的证明途径

title: Global well-posedness of non-integrable hyperbolic-ellptic Ishimori system in the critical Sobolev space
summary: We consider the Cauchy problem for the hyperbolic-elliptic Ishimori system with general decoupling constant $κ\in \mathbb{R}$ and prove global well-posedness in the critical Sobolev space. The proof relies primarily on new bilinear estimates, which are established via a novel div-curl lemma first introduced by the second author in \cite{zhou_1+2dimensional_2022}. Our approach combines the caloric gauge technique with $U^p$-$V^p$ type Strichartz estimates to handle the hyperbolic structure of the equation. The results extend previous work on the integrable case $κ= 1$ to general $κ$ and provide a unified framework that also applies to hyperbolic and elliptic Schrödinger maps in dimensions $d \ge 2$.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有一般解耦常数κ的Ishimori系统在临界Sobolev空间中的全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究双曲-椭圆Ishimori系统的Cauchy问题，该问题是可积系统理论中的重要模型，之前研究主要集中在可积情况κ=1，本文将其推广到一般κ值
AI.techniques: 结合热规范技术、U^p-V^p型Strichartz估计，以及作者提出的新型div-curl引理建立的双线性估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Ishimori系统在临界Sobolev空间中的全局适定性，将结果从可积情况κ=1推广到一般κ∈ℝ
AI.significance: 为研究一般κ值的Ishimori系统提供了统一框架，该框架也适用于d≥2维的双曲和椭圆Schrödinger映射，扩展了可积系统理论的研究范围

title: Liouville theorems and gradient estimates of a nonlinear elliptic equation for the V-Laplacian
summary: In this paper we establish gradient estimates for positive solutions to the nonlinear elliptic equation $$Δ_{V}u^{m}+μ(x)u+p(x)u^α=0 , \quad m>1$$on any smooth metric measure space whose $k$-Bakry-Émery curvature is bounded from below by $-(k-1)K$ with $K \geq 0$. Additionally, we obtain related Liouville theorems and Harnack inequalities. We partially extend conclusions of Wang, when $V=0$, $μ=0$ the equation becomes $Δu^{m}+p(x)u^α=0$. And $V=f$, $μ=c, p=0 $, the equation becomes $Δ_{f}u^{m}+cu=0 $.

AI.tldr: 在度量测度空间上建立非线性椭圆方程正解的梯度估计、Liouville定理和Harnack不等式
AI.motivation: 研究具有Bakry-Émery曲率下界的度量测度空间上非线性椭圆方程的正解性质，推广Wang等人的结果，统一处理多种特殊情形
AI.techniques: 利用Bakry-Émery曲率条件，发展梯度估计技术，结合极大值原理和比较方法，处理非线性项和势函数项
AI.main_theorems: 在k-Bakry-Émery曲率有下界的度量测度空间上，建立了方程Δ_V u^m + μ(x)u + p(x)u^α = 0正解的梯度估计、Liouville型定理和Harnack不等式
AI.significance: 推广了Wang等人的经典结果，统一处理了多种非线性椭圆方程，为度量测度空间上的非线性分析提供了新工具，具有理论意义

title: On the structure of entropy dissipation and regularity for quasi-entropy solutions to 1d scalar conservation laws and to isentropic Euler system with $γ=3$
summary: In this paper, we first investigate quasi-entropy solutions to scalar conservation laws in several space dimensions. In this setting, we introduce a suitable Lagrangian representation for such solutions. Next, we prove that, in one space dimension and for fluxes $f$ satisfying a general non-degeneracy condition, the entropy dissipation measures of quasi-entropy solutions are concentrated on a 1-rectifiable set. The same result is obtained for the isentropic Euler system with $γ= 3$, for which we also slightly improve the available fractional regularity by exploiting the sign of the kinetic measures.

AI.tldr: 证明了在一维空间中，满足非退化条件的通量下，拟熵解的熵耗散测度集中在1-可求长集上，并对γ=3的等熵欧拉系统得到类似结果
AI.motivation: 研究多维标量守恒律的拟熵解及其拉格朗日表示，特别关注熵耗散测度的几何结构，旨在理解解的正则性和奇性分布
AI.techniques: 引入拟熵解的拉格朗日表示方法，利用非退化通量条件，分析熵耗散测度的集中性质，对等熵欧拉系统利用动能测度的符号改进分数正则性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 一维空间中，满足一般非退化条件的通量下，拟熵解的熵耗散测度集中在1-可求长集上；2. 对γ=3的等熵欧拉系统，得到相同结果并略微改进可用的分数正则性
AI.significance: 为守恒律解的奇性结构提供几何刻画，深化对熵耗散机制的理解，对双曲型偏微分方程的正则性理论有重要贡献

title: Mean-field limits for interacting particles on general adaptive dynamical networks
summary: We study the large-population limit of interacting particle systems evolving on adaptive dynamical networks, motivated in particular by models of opinion dynamics. In such systems, agents interact through weighted graphs whose structure evolves over time in a coupled manner with the agents' states, leading to non-exchangeable dynamics. In the dense-graph regime, we show that the asymptotic behavior is described by a Vlasov-type equation posed on an extended phase space that includes both the agents' states and identities and the evolving interaction weights. We establish this limiting equation through two complementary approaches. The first follows the mean-field methodology in the spirit of Sznitman [28]. In this framework, we impose the additional assumption that the weight dynamics is independent of one of the agent's states, an assumption that remains well motivated from a modeling perspective and allows for a direct derivation of the mean-field limit. The second approach is based on the graph limit framework and is formulated in a deterministic setting. This perspective makes it possible to remove the aforementioned restriction on the weight dynamics and to handle more general interaction structures. Our analysis includes wellposedness and stability results for the limiting Vlasov-type equation, as well as quantitative estimates ensuring the propagation of independence. We further clarify the relationship between the continuum (graph limit) formulation and the mean-field limit, thereby providing a unified description of the asymptotic dynamics of interacting particle systems on adaptive dynamical networks.

AI.tldr: 建立了自适应动态网络上交互粒子系统的大群体极限理论，通过Vlasov型方程描述扩展相空间中的渐近行为。
AI.motivation: 研究自适应动态网络上交互粒子系统的大群体极限，特别是意见动力学模型。这类系统中，智能体通过加权图交互，图结构与智能体状态耦合演化，导致非可交换动力学。
AI.techniques: 采用两种互补方法：1) Sznitman风格的均值场方法，要求权重动力学独立于某个智能体状态；2) 基于图极限框架的确定性方法，可处理更一般的交互结构。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了渐近行为由扩展相空间上的Vlasov型方程描述，建立了该极限方程的存在唯一性和稳定性结果，给出了独立性传播的定量估计，并阐明了连续（图极限）公式与均值场极限的关系。
AI.significance: 为自适应动态网络上交互粒子系统提供了统一的渐近动力学描述，连接了均值场和图极限两种框架，对复杂系统建模和意见动力学理论有重要贡献。

title: $BV$-Estimates for Non-Linear Parabolic PDE with Linear Drift
summary: In the present work, we establish space Bounded Variation $(BV)$ regularity of the solution for a non-linear parabolic partial differential equations involving a linear drift term. We study the problem in a bounded domain with mixed Dirichlet-Neumann boundary conditions, a general non-linearity and reasonable assumptions on the data. Our results also cover, as a particular case, the linear transport equation in a bounded domain with an outward-pointing drift vector field on the boundary.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有线性漂移项的非线性抛物型偏微分方程解的BV空间正则性
AI.motivation: 研究具有线性漂移项的非线性抛物型PDE在混合Dirichlet-Neumann边界条件下的解的正则性，特别是BV空间正则性，该结果也适用于有界域中具有向外指向边界漂移向量场的线性输运方程
AI.techniques: 使用BV空间理论、抛物型PDE的正则性估计、混合边界条件处理、非线性项分析以及漂移项的特殊处理技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在一般非线性和合理数据假设下，具有线性漂移项的非线性抛物型PDE在有界域中的解具有BV空间正则性，该结果包含线性输运方程作为特例
AI.significance: 为具有漂移项的抛物型方程提供了重要的正则性结果，扩展了BV空间理论在非线性抛物型方程中的应用，对输运方程和流体力学中的正则性问题有重要意义

title: On the existence of forward self-similar solutions to the two-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations
summary: We establish the global existence of forward self-similar solutions to the two-dimensional incompressible Navier-Stokes equations for any divergence-free initial velocity $u_0$ that is homogeneous of degree $-1$ and locally Hölder continuous. This result requires no smallness assumption on the initial data. In sharp contrast to the three-dimensional case, where $(-1)$-homogeneous vector fields are locally square-integrable, the 2D problem is critical in the sense that the initial kinetic energy is locally infinite at the origin, and the initial vorticity fails to be locally integrable. Consequently, the classical local energy estimates are not available. To overcome this, we decompose the solution into a linear part solving the heat equation and a finite-energy perturbation part. By exploiting a kind of inherent cancellation relation between the linear part and the perturbation part, we can control interaction terms and establish the $H^1$-estimates for the perturbation part. Further investigating the corresponding Leray system in weighted Sobolev space, we can derive an optimal pointwise estimate. This gives the faster decay of the perturbation part at infinity and enables us to construct global-in-time self-similar solutions.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在任意无散度、-1次齐次、局部Hölder连续初值下的全局自相似解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究二维Navier-Stokes方程在临界情况下的全局自相似解存在性问题。与三维情况不同，二维问题中-1次齐次的初值导致原点处局部动能无限大，涡度不可局部积分，经典能量估计失效，需要新的分析方法。
AI.techniques: 将解分解为热方程的线性部分和有限能量扰动部分；利用线性部分与扰动部分之间的内在抵消关系控制相互作用项；在加权Sobolev空间中研究对应的Leray系统；建立最优逐点估计。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于任意无散度、-1次齐次、局部Hölder连续的初速度，二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程存在全局自相似解，无需初值的小性假设。
AI.significance: 解决了二维Navier-Stokes方程临界情况下的全局适定性问题，突破了经典能量估计的限制，为研究奇异性态和自相似解提供了新的理论框架，对理解流体方程的长时间行为有重要意义。

title: On the Fučík spectrum of the Logarithmic Laplacian
summary: In this paper, we investigate the Fučík spectrum $Σ_L$ associated with the logarithmic Laplacian. This spectrum is defined as the set of all pairs $(α,β) \in \mathbb{R}^2$ for which the problem \[ L_Δu = αu^+-βu^- ~\text{in} ~ Ω\quad \text{and} \quad u=0 ~\text{in} ~\mathbb{R}^N\setminus Ω\] admits a nontrivial solution $u$. Here, $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^N$ is a bounded domain with $C^{1,1}$ boundary, $u^\pm = \max\{\pm u,0\}$, and $u = u^+ - u^-$. We show that the lines $λ_1^L \times \mathbb{R}$ and $\mathbb{R} \times λ_1^L$, where $λ_1^L$ denotes the first eigenvalue of $L_Δ$, lies in the spectrum $Σ_L$ and are isolated within the spectrum. Furthermore, we establish the existence of the first nontrivial curve in $Σ_L$ and analyze its qualitative properties, including Lipschitz continuity, strict monotonicity, and asymptotic behavior. In addition, we obtain a variational characterization of the second eigenvalue of the logarithmic Laplacian and show that all eigenfunctions corresponding to eigenvalues $λ> λ_1^L$ are sign-changing. Finally, we address a nonresonance problem with respect to the Fučík spectrum $Σ_L$, employing variational methods and carefully overcoming the difficulties arising from the contrasting features of the first eigenvalue $λ_1^L$.

AI.tldr: 研究对数拉普拉斯算子的Fučík谱，建立其基本结构性质，包括第一非平凡曲线的存在性和特征值变分刻画
AI.motivation: 对数拉普拉斯算子是非局部算子的重要特例，其Fučík谱的研究对于理解非线性椭圆问题的共振现象和非线性特征值问题具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 变分方法、谱理论、非线性分析、Lipschitz连续性分析、渐近行为分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明λ₁ᴸ×ℝ和ℝ×λ₁ᴸ在谱中且孤立；2) 建立第一非平凡曲线的存在性及其Lipschitz连续性、严格单调性和渐近行为；3) 给出对数拉普拉斯算子第二特征值的变分刻画；4) 证明λ>λ₁ᴸ的所有特征函数变号
AI.significance: 扩展了对数拉普拉斯算子的谱理论，为研究相关非线性椭圆方程的共振问题提供了理论基础，对非局部算子理论有重要贡献

title: The uniqueness and concentration behavior of solutions for a nonlinear fractional Schrödinger system
summary: The paper is concerned with a nonlinear system of two coupled fractional Schrödinger equations with both attractive intraspecies and attractive interspecies interactions in $\mathbb{R}$. By analyzing an associated $L^2$-constrained minimization problem, the uniqueness of solutions to this system is proved via the implicit function theorem. Under a certain type of trapping potential, by establishing some delicate energy estimates, we present a detailed analysis on the concentration behavior of the solutions as the total strength of intraspecies and interspecies interactions tends to a critical value, where each component of the solutions blows up and concentrates at a flattest common minimum point of the associated trapping potentials. An optimal blow-up rate of solutions to the system is also given.

AI.tldr: 证明了耦合分数阶薛定谔方程系统解的唯一性，并分析了在相互作用强度趋于临界值时解的爆破和集中行为
AI.motivation: 研究具有吸引性种内和种间相互作用的耦合分数阶薛定谔方程系统，这类系统在玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚、非线性光学等物理现象中有重要应用，需要理解其解的唯一性、爆破行为和集中现象
AI.techniques: 使用L²约束最小化问题分析、隐函数定理证明唯一性，建立精细的能量估计，分析解在相互作用强度趋于临界值时的集中行为，确定最优爆破速率
AI.main_theorems: 1. 解的唯一性定理；2. 解在相互作用强度趋于临界值时的集中行为定理；3. 最优爆破速率估计；4. 解分量在势阱最平坦共同极小点处的爆破和集中
AI.significance: 为分数阶耦合薛定谔方程系统提供了系统的数学分析框架，揭示了非线性相互作用对解行为的影响机制，对理解玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚中的相变现象有重要理论意义

title: Global stability of vacuum for the relativistic Vlasov-Maxwell-Boltzmann system
summary: We consider the three-dimensional relativistic Vlasov-Maxwell-Boltzmann system, where the speed of light $c$ is an arbitrary constant no less than 1, and we establish global existence and nonlinear stability of the vacuum for small initial data, with bounds that are uniform in $c$. The analysis is based on the vector field method combined with the Glassey-Strauss decomposition of the electromagnetic field, and does not require any compact support assumption on the initial data. A key ingredient of the proof is the derivation of a chain rule for the relativistic Boltzmann collision operator that is compatible with the commutation properties of the vector fields. These tools allow us to control the coupled kinetic and electromagnetic equations and to obtain global stability near vacuum.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维相对论性Vlasov-Maxwell-Boltzmann系统在任意光速常数下的真空全局存在性与非线性稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究三维相对论性Vlasov-Maxwell-Boltzmann系统，其中光速c是任意不小于1的常数，旨在建立小初值下真空解的全局存在性和非线性稳定性，且估计与光速c无关
AI.techniques: 向量场方法与Glassey-Strauss电磁场分解相结合，推导了与向量场交换性质相容的相对论Boltzmann碰撞算子的链式法则
AI.main_theorems: 证明了三维相对论Vlasov-Maxwell-Boltzmann系统在小初值下的真空全局存在性与非线性稳定性，且估计对光速c一致
AI.significance: 这是相对论性动理学方程的重要进展，首次在不依赖初值紧支集假设下建立了全局稳定性，为等离子体物理和天体物理中的相对论效应建模提供了理论基础

title: Fractional heat content asymptotics for Carnot groups
summary: We propose a novel approach for studying small-time asymptotics of the fractional heat content of $C^2$ non-characteristic domains in Carnot groups. Denoting the sub-Laplacian operator by $\mathcal{L}$, the fractional heat content of a bounded domain $Ω$ is defined as $Q^{(α)}_Ω(t)=\int_Ω u_α(t,x)dx$, where $u_α$ is the solution to the heat equation corresponding to the fractional sub-Laplacian $\mathcal{L}_α:=\mathcal{L}^{α/2}$ with Dirichlet boundary condition on $Ω$. We prove that for $1\leα\le 2$, there exists explict rate function $μ_α: (0,\infty)\to (0,\infty)$ such that \[ \lim_{t\to 0}\frac{|Ω|-Q^{(α)}_Ω(t)}{μ_α(t)}=|\partialΩ|_H, \] where $|\partialΩ|_H$ is the horizontal perimeter of $Ω$. Moreover, the rate function $μ_α$ coincides with the same for the Euclidean case.

AI.tldr: 在Carnot群中建立了分数次热容量的短时渐近公式，揭示了其与水平周长的关系
AI.motivation: 研究Carnot群中分数次热容量的短时渐近行为，这是经典热容量问题在非交换几何和亚椭圆算子理论中的推广
AI.techniques: 利用分数次亚拉普拉斯算子的热核估计、几何测度论方法、以及Carnot群中的水平几何分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于1≤α≤2，存在显式速率函数μ_α使得分数次热容量的短时渐近极限等于域的水平周长，且μ_α与欧几里得情形一致
AI.significance: 将经典热容量渐近理论推广到非交换几何框架，为Carnot群中的几何分析提供了新工具，连接了分数次算子理论与几何测度论

title: Time Reparametrization and Chaotic Dynamics in Conformable $C_0$-Semigroups
summary: Conformable derivatives provide a fractional-looking calculus that remains local and admits a simple representation through classical derivatives with explicit weights. In this paper we develop a systematic operator-theoretic perspective showing that conformable time evolution is, in essence, a classical $C_0$-semigroup observed through a nonlinear clock. We introduce the conformable time map $ψ(t)=t^α/α$ and prove that every $C_0$--$α$-semigroup $\{T_α(t)\}_{t\ge0}$ can be written as $T_α(t)=T(ψ(t))$ for a uniquely determined classical $C_0$-semigroup $\{T(s)\}_{s\ge0}$, with generators agreeing on a common domain. This correspondence yields a one-to-one transfer of mild solutions and shows that orbit-based linear dynamics are invariant under conformable reparametrization. In particular, $α$-hypercyclicity and $α$--chaos coincide with the usual notions for the associated classical semigroup. As a consequence, we obtain a conformable version of the Desch--Schappacher--Webb spectral criterion for chaos. We also place the analysis in the natural functional setting provided by conformable Lebesgue spaces $L^{p,α}$ and their explicit isometric identification with standard $L^p$ spaces, which allows one to transport estimates and spectral arguments without loss. The results clarify which dynamical phenomena in conformable models are genuinely new and which are inherited from classical semigroup dynamics via a nonlinear change of time.

AI.tldr: 建立了可形变导数时间演化与经典C0-半群之间的算子理论对应关系，揭示了可形变演化本质上是经典半群通过非线性时钟的观测
AI.motivation: 可形变导数提供了一种保持局部性的分数阶微积分，但其算子理论框架和动力学性质尚不明确。本文旨在建立可形变时间演化与经典半群理论之间的系统联系，澄清哪些动力学现象是真正新的，哪些是通过非线性时间变换从经典动力学继承而来。
AI.techniques: 引入可形变时间映射ψ(t)=t^α/α，建立C0-α-半群与经典C0-半群的一一对应；利用可形变Lebesgue空间L^{p,α}及其与标准L^p空间的等距同构；应用谱理论和动力学系统方法；推广Desch-Schappacher-Webb谱判据到可形变情形
AI.main_theorems: 证明每个C0-α-半群{T_α(t)}可唯一表示为T_α(t)=T(ψ(t))，其中{T(s)}是经典C0-半群；建立生成元在共同定义域上的一致性；证明温和解的一一对应；证明α-超循环性和α-混沌性等价于对应经典半群的相应性质；获得可形变版本的Desch-Schappacher-Webb混沌谱判据
AI.significance: 为可形变微积分提供了严格的算子理论框架；澄清了可形变动力学与经典半群动力学的关系；建立了可形变空间与经典空间的等距同构，便于估计和谱分析的传递；为可形变偏微分方程的动力学研究提供了理论基础

title: Teukolsky on slowly-rotating Kerr-de Sitter in the vanishing $Λ$ limit
summary: We prove energy, Morawetz and $r^p$-weighted estimates for solutions to the Teukolsky equation set on a slowly-rotating Kerr-de Sitter background. The main feature of our estimates is their uniformity with respect to the cosmological constant $Λ>0$ (thus allowed to tend to $0$), while they hold on the whole domain of outer communications, extending up to $r\sim Λ^{-\frac{1}{2}}$. As an application of our result, we recover well-known corresponding estimates for solutions to Teukolsky on a slowly-rotating Kerr background in the limit $Λ\to 0$.

AI.tldr: 证明了在缓慢旋转Kerr-de Sitter背景下Teukolsky方程的能量、Morawetz和$r^p$加权估计，其估计在宇宙常数Λ→0时具有一致性
AI.motivation: 研究Teukolsky方程在Kerr-de Sitter时空中的稳定性问题，该时空包含宇宙常数Λ>0，需要建立与Λ无关的估计，以便在Λ→0时能够恢复Kerr背景下的已知结果
AI.techniques: 使用能量方法、Morawetz估计和$r^p$加权估计技术，建立与宇宙常数Λ无关的一致估计，证明在外部通信区域直至$r\sim Λ^{-\frac{1}{2}}$的范围内都成立
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Teukolsky方程在缓慢旋转Kerr-de Sitter背景下的能量估计、Morawetz估计和$r^p$加权估计，这些估计在Λ→0时具有一致性，并覆盖整个外部通信区域
AI.significance: 为Kerr-de Sitter时空中的线性稳定性问题提供了关键工具，建立了与Λ无关的估计框架，使得在Λ→0极限下能够恢复Kerr背景下的经典结果，对黑洞稳定性理论有重要意义

title: Trace regularity of solutions to the Navier equations
summary: We present results on the trace regularity of the stress vector on the boundary of an elastic solid satisfying the time-dependent, displacement-traction problem for the Navier equations of linear elasticity in a bounded domain of $\mathbb{R}^3$. Specifically, the solid's displacement is subject to Dirichlet- and Neumann-type conditions on different portions of its boundary and possibly non-zero body forces and initial data. Our regularity results are reminiscent of the so-called "hidden trace regularity" results for solutions to the scalar wave equation obtained in [12].

AI.tldr: 建立了三维弹性固体边界应力向量的迹正则性结果，类似于波动方程的"隐藏迹正则性"。
AI.motivation: 研究线性弹性Navier方程在时变位移-牵引问题中边界应力向量的正则性，该问题包含Dirichlet和Neumann边界条件、非零体力和初始数据。
AI.techniques: 借鉴波动方程的"隐藏迹正则性"方法，应用于线性弹性系统，处理混合边界条件和时变问题。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了弹性固体边界应力向量的迹正则性结果，类似于波动方程中的相应结果。
AI.significance: 扩展了迹正则性理论到弹性力学领域，为边界控制和反问题分析提供了理论基础，连接了波动方程和弹性系统的正则性理论。
